title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 20–23, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My eyes were never wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm very sure that there's a lot of treasure in that large rock hill!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I've been stuck in this chest!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've only been able to protect the treasure these past 20 years!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That treasure is all mine!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uh! That's right!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Those are yours, Uncle!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Okay! Gaimon-san!! We'll help you bring down those treasures!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What? Is that true? That's very nice!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I knew I hadn't mis- judged you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Aren't you a professional thief that steals treasure from Pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't speak nonsense! I have principles too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is it....

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's been a long time...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since the last time I came here

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But why haven't you

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Asked anyone to help you before?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because I don't trust anybody!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Anyone who sees me like this wouldn't believe me anyway

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Damn! Damn! The treasure is just up there, but I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've waited for this moment so long,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Today is the HAP- Piest Day of my Life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go for it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You want me to go up there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course! Do you think that I can climb this?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you, straw- hat kid!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Okay...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grab!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: wow!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There really are some treasure chests up here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There are five of them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's great!!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
